summary_en: 50,000 shares, maximum ¥45.0M, 0.7% of outstanding shares. Market purchase via discretionary contract (取引一任契約). Execution period 25 May 2026 to 12 November 2026.
title_en: Notice on Decision of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Based on Articles of Incorporation pursuant to Article 165(2) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Commerce One Holdings Inc. resolved at its board meeting on 14 May 2026 to acquire treasury shares under the discretionary contract method (取引一任契約に基づく市場買付). The programme authorises acquisition of up to 50,000 ordinary shares, representing 0.7% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), for a maximum total expenditure of ¥45.0 million. The acquisition period runs from 25 May 2026 to 12 November 2026. The company states that the buyback reflects strategic financial management, taking into account investment opportunities, financial position, and share price levels to pursue flexible treasury share acquisition. At the time of the board resolution, the company held 193,949 treasury shares out of a total of 6,999,451 shares outstanding.
